task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Ford F-150 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $38810.00 and wholesale is $27668.00. Product features: Full-size pickup truck with aluminum-alloy body and up to 14000 lbs towing capacity. Reference: https://www.ford.com/trucks/f150/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Ford F-150. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Ford F-150. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
